category_sources: source_facts.description says SFTP server with HTTP/S, FTP/S, and WebDAV; official README describes SFTPGo as a full-featured event-driven file transfer solution: https://github.com/drakkan/sftpgo
display_name_sources: Official website/repository use SFTPGo capitalization: https://github.com/drakkan/sftpgo
docs_sources: Official README links docs.sftpgo.com for all supported features and configuration options: https://github.com/drakkan/sftpgo
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/drakkan/sftpgo; per instruction repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official README lists SFTP, HTTP/S, FTP/S, WebDAV protocols and repository topics include sftp-server, ftp-server, webdav-server, and go: https://github.com/drakkan/sftpgo
